title: Spirit & Character
question: From today's teaching: what is the best way to build a positive habit as a goD?
optionB: Start small daily and stay consistent
optionC: Do a big change once and stop
explain: Positive habits are built by small consistent actions — not willpower bursts. A goD who is faithful in little will be faithful in much.
videoTitle: The #2 Law of Habits: Make Success Irresistible (Want It!)

title: Integrity
question: A Nation Builder finds money on the ground at school. What should they do?
optionB: Ask around and return it / give to a teacher
optionC: Spend it fast so no one knows
explain: Nation Builders carry integrity as a lifestyle. Small honesty builds big trust — and trust builds nations.

title: Service
question: Your community street is dirty. As a goD, what is your best first move?
optionB: Start a small cleanup with 1–2 people and document it
explain: goDs start with what they have, where they are. Small faithful service becomes visible impact.

title: Discipline
question: You missed your prayer and study plan today. What should you do tonight?
optionB: Reset: plan tomorrow + one small action right now
optionC: Blame your schedule and move on
explain: Consistency is built by quick resets, not perfect days. A goD who bounces back keeps growing.

title: Courage
question: People laugh when you share a God-inspired idea. What does a goD do?
optionB: Explain clearly, then build a small proof
explain: Holy courage looks like calm, submitted action. Build proof — let the fruit speak.

title: Excellence
question: You can do your assignment quickly or excellently. What is the builder's choice?
optionB: Excellently first, then faster over time
optionC: Never finish because it must be perfect
explain: Excellence is a Spirit-led choice. Quality before speed — then speed comes naturally with practice.
